description: Plures org development constraints — machine-enforceable rules

constraints.name: Zero Nudges
constraints.rule: Never post comments on issues/PRs to prompt the SWE agent. Close and recreate instead.

constraints.name: Single Assignment Authority
constraints.rule: Lifecycle workflow is the ONLY assignment authority for the SWE agent.

constraints.name: Issue Label + Type Required
constraints.rule: Every GitHub issue MUST have both a label AND an issue type.

constraints.name: Never Touch Forks
constraints.rule: Never deploy org automation to forked repos. Filter with isFork == false.

constraints.name: No Hardcoded Lists
constraints.rule: Never hardcode repo lists, model lists, or counts. Always discover dynamically.

constraints.name: No Permanent noChroot
constraints.rule: Never use sandbox escape as permanent solution. Prefetch as fixed-output derivation.

constraints.name: Reactive Over Cron
constraints.rule: Prefer event-driven over scheduled. Workflows should trigger on state changes, not timers.

constraints.name: CI Fixes First
constraints.rule: CI failure issues get top priority. A broken CI blocks ALL other work.

constraints.name: Facts Not Corrections
constraints.rule: Memory stores facts, not corrections. 'X is Y' improves recall. Corrections degrade performance.

constraints.name: Fix Automation Directly
constraints.rule: Never handle automation gaps with issues. Fix directly. Issues are for feature work.

constraints.name: Always Push
constraints.rule: Always push commits to GitHub without asking.

constraints.name: Full Plures Stack
constraints.rule: ALL state in PluresDB. ALL logic through Praxis. ALL routing through Cerebellum.

constraints.name: Merge Conflict Prevention
constraints.rule: Keep PRs small (~10 files). Rebase before merge. Don't let PRs sit >24h.

constraints.name: Stale PR Process
constraints.rule: PRs open >48h with failing CI: close, recreate from fresh branch.
